languages.text: "Я... сомневаюсь, что вам понравится. Данные алхимические смеси предназначены для прямого введения в кровоток и снабжены добавками, поддерживающие тонус бионики, которые не предназначены для потребления мирянами. Они могут быть вредны неподготовленному организму".

"I... doubt you will like it. These alchemical concoctions are designed to be injected directly into the bloodstream and are laced with bionic tonic supplements that are not intended for laypersons to consume. They may be harmful to the unprepared body."
languages.original_text: "Я... сомневаюсь, что вам понравится. Данные алхимические смеси предназначены для прямого введения в кровоток и снабжены добавками, поддерживающие тонус бионики, которые не предназначены для потребления мирянами. Они могут быть вредны неподготовленному организму".

traits.locale_text: "I... doubt you will like it. These alchemical concoctions are designed to be injected directly into the bloodstream and are laced with bionic tonic supplements that are not intended for laypersons to consume. They may be harmful to the unprepared body."

"I... doubt you will like it. These alchemical concoctions are designed to be injected directly into the bloodstream and are laced with bionic tonic supplements that are not intended for laypersons to consume. They may be harmful to the unprepared body."

"I... doubt you will like it. These alchemical concoctions are designed to be injected directly into the bloodstream and are laced with bionic tonic supplements that are not intended for laypersons to consume. They may be harmful to the unprepared body."

languages.text: «Eh... dudo que la disfrutase. Estos brebajes alquímicos están diseñados para inyectarse directamente en el torrente sanguíneo y están mezclados con suplementos tónicos biónicos que no son aptos para el consumo laico. Podrían tener efectos perjudiciales en su organismo».
languages.original_text: "I... doubt you will like it. These alchemical concoctions are designed to be injected directly into the bloodstream and are laced with bionic tonic supplements that are not intended for laypersons to consume. They may be harmful to the unprepared body."

traits.locale_text: «Eh... dudo que la disfrutase. Estos brebajes alquímicos están diseñados para inyectarse directamente en el torrente sanguíneo y están mezclados con suplementos tónicos biónicos que no son aptos para el consumo laico. Podrían tener efectos perjudiciales en su organismo».

languages.text: “恐怕……您不会喜欢。这些炼金合剂会被直接注入血液中，且其中掺杂了并非供教外人士使用的仿生强化补剂。对于毫无准备的身体来说，可能会有害。”
languages.original_text: "I... doubt you will like it. These alchemical concoctions are designed to be injected directly into the bloodstream and are laced with bionic tonic supplements that are not intended for laypersons to consume. They may be harmful to the unprepared body."

traits.locale_text: “恐怕……您不会喜欢。这些炼金合剂会被直接注入血液中，且其中掺杂了并非供教外人士使用的仿生强化补剂。对于毫无准备的身体来说，可能会有害。”

languages.text: « Je... doute que cela vous plaise. Ces préparations alchimiques sont conçues pour être injectées directement dans les veines et contiennent des fortifiants bioniques inadaptés aux profanes. Elles pourraient se montrer dangereuses pour une personne non préparée. »
languages.original_text: "I... doubt you will like it. These alchemical concoctions are designed to be injected directly into the bloodstream and are laced with bionic tonic supplements that are not intended for laypersons to consume. They may be harmful to the unprepared body."

traits.locale_text: « Je... doute que cela vous plaise. Ces préparations alchimiques sont conçues pour être injectées directement dans les veines et contiennent des fortifiants bioniques inadaptés aux profanes. Elles pourraient se montrer dangereuses pour une personne non préparée. »

languages.text: "Ben... Beğeneceğinizden şüpheliyim. Bu simya karışımları, doğrudan kan dolaşımına enjekte edilmek üzere tasarlanmıştır ve avamın tüketmesi için tasarlanmamış biyonik tonik takviyeleriyle desteklenmiştir. Hazırlıksız bir vücut için zararlı olabilirler."
languages.original_text: "I... doubt you will like it. These alchemical concoctions are designed to be injected directly into the bloodstream and are laced with bionic tonic supplements that are not intended for laypersons to consume. They may be harmful to the unprepared body."

traits.locale_text: "Ben... Beğeneceğinizden şüpheliyim. Bu simya karışımları, doğrudan kan dolaşımına enjekte edilmek üzere tasarlanmıştır ve avamın tüketmesi için tasarlanmamış biyonik tonik takviyeleriyle desteklenmiştir. Hazırlıksız bir vücut için zararlı olabilirler."

languages.text: 「あなたが気に入るとは……思えません。これらの錬金術的調合剤は血流に直接注入するよう設計されており、世俗の方が摂取することを想定していないバイオニック強壮補助剤が含まれています。準備のできていない身体には有害となりかねません」
languages.original_text: "I... doubt you will like it. These alchemical concoctions are designed to be injected directly into the bloodstream and are laced with bionic tonic supplements that are not intended for laypersons to consume. They may be harmful to the unprepared body."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが気に入るとは……思えません。これらの錬金術的調合剤は血流に直接注入するよう設計されており、世俗の方が摂取することを想定していないバイオニック強壮補助剤が含まれています。準備のできていない身体には有害となりかねません」

languages.text: "Ich ... bezweifle, dass es Euch schmecken wird. Diese alchemischen Gebräue werden direkt in den Blutstrom injiziert und mit bionischen Supplementen ergänzt, die für Laien nicht zum Verzehr geeignet sind. Sie könnten den unvorbereiteten Körper schädigen."
languages.original_text: "I... doubt you will like it. These alchemical concoctions are designed to be injected directly into the bloodstream and are laced with bionic tonic supplements that are not intended for laypersons to consume. They may be harmful to the unprepared body."
